---
title: "My First R Markdown Report"
author: "Bryce Hales"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Introduction

This is my first R Markdown report. It includes text, R code, and a visual output created in R.

```{r load-packages}
library(tidyverse)


# Create a simple dataset
data <- tibble(
  x = 1:10,
  y = x^2
)

# Plot the data
ggplot(data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Quadratic Plot")
```
